text: Evaluation aims to compare programs to assess the positive and negative aspects of programs in order to make sound decisions to improve or develop programs. The study aimed to examine the concepts, objectives, principles, procedures, influencing factors, obstacle factors and solutions of educational program evaluation. The research method used in this study is literature review by conducting a literature review analysis to discuss the concepts and procedures of the educational program evaluation and the factors to be considered in the educational program evaluation. The results show that the educational program evaluation aims to measure the performance of the program and to determine the points that need to be improved and to encourage institutions to improve educational quality. In conducting the educational program evaluation, it is necessary to apply the principle of objectivity related to the purposes of the program. In addition, the preparation, implementation and evaluation of educational programs also needs to be considered. In this regard, influencing factors to the educational program evaluation, such as Government policy and educational institutions that have policies that are strong and explicit regarding the implementation of the educational program evaluation with the requirements of the evaluation standards, methods and schedules, are needed to be understood. While other obstacle factors need to be solved so that the implementation of educational program evaluation is successful, such as shortage of budget and also the competence of evaluators.
